description: pm e2e suites. Each suite drives the pm skill headless on one machine (no members, no MCP) through a full plan -> start -> cleanup sprint on the fleet-e2e-toy repo, picking 3 ready P1 beads issues. Success is judged by independent validation gates against the resulting branch + PR (see validate-sprint.mjs), not self-reported checkpoints. Suites are OS-independent; the runner is chosen via the workflow runner input.
